task_completion.description: Agent searches for the target coordinates or location name
task_completion.visual_evidence: The search bar in the application contains '31.0, 31.0' or 'Nile Delta' and the search is executed.

task_completion.description: The Nile Delta is clearly visible in the viewport
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main map view displays the characteristic triangular green shape of the Nile Delta meeting the sea.

task_completion.description: View is oriented North-up with no tilt (top-down)
task_completion.visual_evidence: The compass indicator shows North pointing straight up, and the map appears flat (2D) without any horizon or 3D perspective visible.

task_completion.description: Agent enters the 'Save Image' mode or opens export options
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Save Image' toolbar or options bar appears at the top of the map view (common in Google Earth Pro) or a file export menu is open.

task_completion.description: The Scale Legend overlay is enabled and visible
task_completion.visual_evidence: A scale bar or legend is visible on the map overlay, or the 'Map Options' dropdown shows the 'Scale' checkbox selected.

task_completion.description: Agent saves the image to the specified path and filename
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file save dialog is visible showing the directory '/home/ga/Documents/' and filename 'nile_delta_map.jpg' before confirming save.

integrity.description: Agent does not use terminal commands to generate the image
integrity.visual_evidence: No usage of terminal commands like 'wget', 'curl', or 'cp' to download or move image files.

integrity.description: Agent interacts with the mapping software GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking buttons and menus within the Google Earth Pro (or similar) application window.

integrity.description: Agent uses the software's native export/save feature
integrity.visual_evidence: The image is generated via the application's 'Save Image' or 'Export' function, not by taking a screenshot of the desktop or using an external screen capture tool.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target location: Latitude 31.0, Longitude 31.0 (Nile Delta). Required visual elements: Scale bar/legend, North-up orientation, Nile Delta landform visible. The agent should use the 'Save Image' feature which typically adds a toolbar for map options (like Scale) to the view.
